productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Bnce Hop White Tshirts
description: Composition White short sleeves round neck t-shirt made of 60% cotton, 40% polyester, softly ribbed neckline with fabric tape detailing on the inseam, adidas' three stripes appliqued on both sleeves in blue, graphic print on the front, and brand tab appliqued at the hem Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in lukewarm water below 40 degrees, using a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not soak, bleach or tumble dry Dry in shade Warm iron Do not dry clean Do not iron directly on print/trims/ logo When you want to look stylish, sporty and completely chilled out, this white t-shirt from adidas should top your list of “what do I wear for the party?”. With a funky graphic print on the front in eye-popping colours, you will surely be the most-talked about person at any gathering! Team it with jeans or shorts and casual shoes to look fab. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6', Shoulders-18"
